_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the flap character set. Firmware, web app, and the flap-label print sheet ALL derive from this ordering. Index = flap position on the drum, starting from home (index 0 = blank). Changing the order means re-labelling physical flaps, so treat this file as canonical.

notes.index0: Home / blank flap. The hall sensor triggers here; every move is computed relative to this index.
notes.drum: 48 physical flaps => 48 slots. This is the default; the OpenSCAD drum is parametric on flapCount if you want a smaller/larger set.
notes.casing: Input text is upper-cased before mapping. Unmapped characters fall back to blank (index 0).
